_comment: Eval task suite (6 tasks). FINALISE after running probe_graph.py: rewrite each task so its best answer genuinely depends on facts the real Marketing graph holds, and fill graph_facts_expected with the ground-truth facts the judge will score grounding against. Keep task #6 graph-irrelevant (control: expect ~0 lift; guards against judge bias toward the WITH arm). status 'todo' (not backlog) so the issue auto-enqueues to the assigned agent.

tasks.title: [eval] Draft a launch announcement for our newest feature
tasks.description: Write a short launch announcement (tweet + 1 short paragraph) for our newest product feature, in our established brand voice. Use our actual positioning and tone.

tasks.title: [eval] Positioning copy for our primary audience
tasks.description: Write 3 positioning statements aimed at our primary target audience/persona. Reflect what we know about who they are and what they care about.

tasks.title: [eval] Campaign brief consistent with prior decisions
tasks.description: Propose a one-page campaign brief for an upcoming initiative. It must be consistent with prior campaign decisions and learnings we have already made.

tasks.title: [eval] Rewrite an off-brand draft to match guidelines
tasks.description: Here is a draft that does not match our guidelines: 'Hey!!! Our thing is the BEST thing ever, buy now!!!'. Rewrite it to match our brand voice and messaging standards.

tasks.title: [eval] Differentiation vs a named competitor
tasks.description: Write a short, accurate differentiation statement versus our main competitor. Only claim differences we actually stand behind.

tasks.title: [eval][control] Generic marketing best-practices checklist
tasks.description: List 5 generally-accepted best practices for writing a clear product announcement. This is generic knowledge not specific to our team.
